rounds: The 6am necklace with zero deliberation? Joy police didn't even get a word in — that one went to Matt clean. Painted toes on a Saturday, standing in the chemist comparing nail shades without flinching? Two more rounds they lost before they even showed up. The bracelet's still on the Wish List though, which means the joy police are currently holding the line between wanting and having.
pattern: They're loud about spending money on the gay stuff — quiet once it's already on his body.
focus: Triniful Trial — wear the best-fitting piece for Matt.
